name: Austrian Cream Cheese Brownies
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. In a large bowl, combine all crust ingredients. Beat at medium speed for about 2 minutes until crumbly and well blended.
3. Press the mixture into an ungreased 13x9-inch pan.
4. Bake in the preheated oven for 12 minutes.
5. Remove from oven and let cool completely.
6. In a small bowl, beat cream cheese, sugar, flour, and eggs at medium speed until smooth, about 2 minutes.
7. Stir in 1 cup of chocolate chips.
8. Pour over the partially baked crust.
9. Return to the preheated oven for an additional 15 to 20 minutes or until the topping is almost set.
10. Remove from oven; sprinkle the remaining 1 cup of chocolate chips on top.
11. Return to the oven for 1 minute to melt the chips.
12. Gently spread the melted chips over the top.
13. Sprinkle with pecans and press lightly into the glaze.
14. Refrigerate for 1 hour before cutting into bars.
15. Store in refrigerator.
